prompt:
Three vehicles are at a roundabout.
Vehicle A is in the roundabout lane.
Vehicle B is in the western approach.
Vehicle C is in the northern approach.
This roundabout follows standard right-of-way rules.

Question: Which vehicle should proceed first under roundabout right-of-way rules?
A) Both can pass at the same time
B) Vehicle C
C) Vehicle A
D) Vehicle B
E) The vehicle that has been waiting at the roundabout entry the longest acquires priority and may enter before circulating traffic
question: Which vehicle should proceed first under roundabout right-of-way rules?

choices.A: Both can pass at the same time
choices.E: The vehicle that has been waiting at the roundabout entry the longest acquires priority and may enter before circulating traffic

audit.context_line: This roundabout follows standard right-of-way rules.
